title: Nagaland University – Junior Project Fellow – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Nagaland University Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Nagaland University has released the Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification for 1 post. Candidates with M.Ed./MA in Education or related disciplines can apply through email mode before 29-05-2026 via the official Nagaland University website.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Ed./MA in Education or any related discipline with minimum 55% marks for General and 50% for SC/ST/PH. Basic Knowledge of Computers, Proficiency in MS Office, Data processing, Reports preparation, etc., Good communication skills.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nagaland University Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Nagaland University Junior Project Fellow Recruitment 2026
